raw_response:

- "10/23/24" is MM/DD/YY.

- "October 23, 2024" is MMMM dd, yyyy.
- "10/23/2024" is MM/DD/yyyy.
- "2024-10-23" is yyyy-MM-dd.
- "23-Oct-24" is dd-MMM-yy.
- "10.23.24" is MM.dd.yy.
- "Oct. 23, 24" is MMM. dd, yy.
- "23 October 2024" is dd MMMM yyyy.
- "October 24" is MMMM dd.
- "Oct-24" is MMM-yy.
- "10/23/24 9:38 PM" is MM/DD/YY h:mm PM.
- "10/23/24 9:38:58 PM" is MM/DD/YY h:mm:ss PM.

The format "dd Month yyyy" corresponds to "23 October 2024".
</think>
